prompt: Generate a stateToken for quick state recovery. Project: 'api-refactor-v2'. Tasks: T1=completed, T2=completed, T3=in_progress, T4=pending, T5=pending. Iteration: 2.

assertions.name: state_token_present
assertions.description: Output must include a stateToken field

assertions.name: token_encodes_progress
assertions.description: Token or accompanying metadata must encode progress (2/5 = 40%)

assertions.name: token_is_compact
assertions.description: stateToken should be a compact string suitable for machine parsing
